text: "Hello?" "Hello?" "Good afternoon. My name is Rebecca. I previously helped you with your Medicare plan. And since it's open enrollment, there are new benefits available now. Let me help you get these added to your plan so you do have Medicare Part A and B, right?" "Oh, I can't do it right now, thank you." "Sorry to catch you at a busy time, but..."
